name: Microsoft Corporation
description: Microsoft Corporation ecosystem — suppliers, customers, partners, holdings, and regulators.

nodes.name: Microsoft Corporation
nodes.relationship: Your stock

nodes.name: NVIDIA Corporation
nodes.relationship: Primary supplier of data center GPUs powering Azure AI and high-performance computing infrastructure

nodes.name: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Supplier of semi-custom processors for Xbox consoles and EPYC CPUs for Azure servers

nodes.name: Intel Corporation
nodes.relationship: Long-standing supplier of Xeon processors for Azure data centers and Core processors for Surface devices

nodes.name: Micron Technology, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Supplier of DRAM and NAND flash memory for cloud servers, Xbox, and Surface products

nodes.name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd.
nodes.relationship: Contract manufacturer for Xbox gaming consoles and Surface hardware devices

nodes.name: United States Government
nodes.relationship: Largest collective enterprise customer across DoD and civilian agency cloud and software contracts

nodes.name: Walmart Inc.
nodes.relationship: Multi-year strategic Azure cloud and Microsoft 365 enterprise customer

nodes.name: AT&T Inc.
nodes.relationship: Multi-billion dollar Azure cloud migration and modern workplace customer

nodes.name: The Coca-Cola Company
nodes.relationship: Global strategic agreement spanning Azure, Dynamics 365, and Microsoft 365

nodes.name: FedEx Corporation
nodes.relationship: Major Azure analytics and cloud infrastructure customer

nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.relationship: Strategic AI partner and exclusive cloud provider via multi-billion dollar investment and deep Azure integration

nodes.name: NVIDIA Corporation
nodes.relationship: Primary GPU and AI infrastructure partner powering Azure AI services and data centers

nodes.name: Adobe Inc.
nodes.relationship: Deep enterprise product integration across Microsoft 365, Teams and Adobe Experience Cloud workflows

nodes.name: SAP SE
nodes.relationship: Strategic cloud partnership anchored by RISE with SAP and joint enterprise solutions on Azure

nodes.name: Intel Corporation
nodes.relationship: Long-standing co-engineering and semiconductor partnership for Windows devices and Azure infrastructure

nodes.name: The Vanguard Group, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Largest institutional shareholder and major ETF provider

nodes.name: BlackRock, Inc.
nodes.relationship: Major institutional equity holder via iShares and active funds

nodes.name: State Street Corporation
nodes.relationship: Major institutional shareholder and custody bank

nodes.name: FMR LLC (Fidelity Investments)
nodes.relationship: Significant institutional shareholder and mutual fund manager

nodes.name: Geode Capital Management, LLC
nodes.relationship: Significant institutional shareholder and quantitative manager

nodes.name: U.S. Department of Defense
nodes.relationship: Major cloud and enterprise software supplier under the JWCC program and broader DoD enterprise agreements.

nodes.name: U.S. Army
nodes.relationship: Prime contractor for the Integrated Visual Augmentation System (IVAS), supplying HoloLens-based augmented reality headsets.

nodes.name: U.K. Crown Commercial Service
nodes.relationship: Strategic software and cloud supplier to the British public sector through national procurement frameworks and enterprise agreements.

nodes.name: U.S. General Services Administration
nodes.relationship: Central federal procurement vehicle for government-wide Microsoft software, cloud, and hardware contracts.

nodes.name: U.S. Department of Homeland Security
nodes.relationship: Key provider of cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity services, and productivity software across DHS agencies.
